text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash greets her second summer camp with
coolness and poise.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We don't have much longer before the autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let's tackle this summer camp as if it's the last
opportunity to prepare myself for it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Once I've done what I need to do, I'm setting my
sights on retirement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This could be my last summer camp with Eishin
Flash...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd better etch the image of her racing down the
track into my memory. There might not be many
more chances.
